external_evidence.claim: Start with error analysis and manually review 20-50 outputs/traces for meaningful changes.
external_evidence.source: Hamel Husain + Shreya Shankar evals FAQ

external_evidence.claim: Evals describe task, run test inputs, analyze results, then iterate.
Break quality into critical components and start with manually curated examples.

purpose: Make evals an executable governance layer: trace review, error taxonomy, validator alignment, and minimum viable evaluation loop before cartridge promotion.
